title: Bequesh

'''Bequesh''', also known as '''The Cardinal''', was the [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Administrator/Legends|administrator]] of the [[Tanquilla Beach/Legends|''Tanquilla Beach'']] [[Shadowport/Legends|shadowport]] located in the [[Kathol sector/Legends|Kathol sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. Born before [[92 BBY/Legends|92 BBY]], Bequesh was a member of an [[outlaw]]-[[Technician/Legends|tech]] [[Unidentified outlaw-tech group|group]] that took possession of a strip [[Mining/Legends|mined]] [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]]. The group relocated it to a [[Nebula/Legends|nebulae]] in a corner of the Kathol [[Sector/Legends|sector]] and established it as one of the sector's main shadowports and [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggling]] hubs.

Bequesh, the last survivor of the group, ruled the station with an iron fist, maintaining an active role in the [[Standard day/Legends|day]]-to-day running of ''Tanquilla Beach''. By [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]], his great age forced him to use a [[Repulsorlift chair/Legends|hoverchair]] for mobility, but he retained the use of his mental faculties. When the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] ''[[FarStar]]'' arrived at the station to repair its [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]], Bequesh met with the [[Starship/Legends|starship's]] [[Officer/Legends|officers]] to determine whether or not they posed a threat to his operations.

==Biography==
[[Reproduction/Legends|Born]] sometime before [[92 BBY/Legends|92 BBY]],<ref name="age" /> the [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] Bequesh was a member of an [[outlaw]]-[[Technician/Legends|tech]] [[Unidentified outlaw-tech group|group]] that took possession of a large [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]] located in a [[Star system/Legends|system]] close to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Gandle Ott]] in the [[Kathol sector/Legends|Kathol sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. The asteroid had been strip-[[Mining/Legends|mined]] and abandoned by miners after its resources were exhausted. Bequesh and the group somehow managed to relocate the asteroid to a small [[Nebula/Legends|nebulae]] located in a remote corner of the [[Sector/Legends|sector]], setting it up as a [[Shadowport/Legends|shadowport]] named [[Tanquilla Beach/Legends|''Tanquilla Beach'']] to serve the needs of [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]] and [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]]. Specializing in technical expertise and high technology, ''Tanquilla Beach'' became one of the sector's main smuggling hubs. Over the [[Standard year/Legends|years]], Bequesh and the group expanded ''Tanquilla Beach'' to include living quarters, technical workshops, and commercial buildings as the shadowport's clientèle grew.<ref name="SD" />

[[File:Tanquilla_Beach.jpg|thumb|left|''Tanquilla Beach'']]
By [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]], Bequesh was the last survivor of the original gang and served as the station's [[Administrator/Legends|administrator]]. His personal quarters were located in a restricted section wing attached to the shadowport's central body. He was protected by his [[Bodyguard/Legends|bodyguard]], [[Hella Brün]], who had saved his life several [[Time/Legends|times]] over the course of her twenty-year service. Known as "The Cardinal," he was believed to be the only individual who knew all of ''Tanquilla Beach''{{'s}} secrets, and his great age had confined him to a [[Repulsorlift chair/Legends|hoverchair]]. Despite his frailty, he was still considered to be the unquestioned ruler of ''Tanquilla Beach'', and maintained a role within the station's [[Standard day/Legends|day]]-to-day operations. Bequesh presided over most trials held on the station, enforcing the ''Tanquilla Beach''{{'s}} iron-clad rules and serving as a deterrent for those individuals who were tempted to break them. Bequesh also took an interest in the affairs of [[Spang]], a talented [[Starship/Legends|starship]] [[Engineer/Legends|engineer]] who ran a repair bay named [[Spang's]]. Spang had procured and installed the weapon systems that defended ''Tanquilla Beach'', and Bequesh made it clear that anyone who messed with Spang was messing with Bequesh himself.<ref name="SD" />

In 8 ABY, the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] ''[[FarStar]]'' arrived at ''Tanquilla Beach'' seeking to repair its [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] which had been sabotaged by an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Agent/Legends|agent]] loyal to [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Kentor Sarne]], a [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]] who had controlled the sector. After being [[Battle of Kal'Shebbol|ousted]] from his [[Capital/Legends|capital]], he had retreated with his [[Moff Sarne's forces|forces]] to the wilds of the sector, and the ''FarStar'' had been assigned to [[DarkStryder Campaign|track him down]]. Curious as to the New Republic's intentions, and whether or not they posed a threat to his operations, Bequesh invited the [[Corvette/Legends|corvette's]] [[Officer/Legends|officers]] to dine with him. Satisfied that they posed no threat, Bequesh allowed the corvette's command crew to remain and seek a way to repair their hyperdrive. Shortly after the ''FarStar''{{'s}} arrival, ''Tanquilla Beach'' was [[Skirmish at Tanquilla Beach|attacked]] by a [[Carrack-class light cruiser/Legends|''Carrack''-class light cruiser]] loyal to Sarne. The combined firepower of ''Tanquilla Beach'' and the ''FarStar'' destroyed the vessel in short order.<ref name="SD" />

==Personality and traits==
An extremely old, wrinkled man with [[Color/Legends|white]] [[Hair/Legends|hair]] by 8 ABY, Bequesh was confined to a hoverchair. However, he still retained his faculties, and maintained an active role in the running of ''Tanquilla Beach''. He was known to be a merciless individual towards those who broke the station's rules.<ref name="SD" />

Bequesh was knowledgeable about [[Alien/Legends|alien]] [[Species/Legends|species]], cultures, [[Language/Legends|languages]], and planetary systems, and had an understanding of the workings of a [[Bureaucrat/Legends|bureaucracy]]. The undisputed master of ''Tanquilla Beach'', he was intimately familiar with its inner workings and what went on aboard the station. Bequesh was a capable negotiator, and could tell the value of objects and goods. A technician by trade, he was able to program and repair [[Computer/Legends|computers]] and [[Droid/Legends|droids]], as well as security systems.<ref name="SD" />

==Equipment==
Bequesh dressed in expensive clothing, such as tasteful [[Robe/Legends|robes]] and sashes. He required a hoverchair to move around and carried a [[Datapad/Legends|datapad]] and [[Comlink/Legends|comlink]] with him.<ref name="SD" />

==Behind the scenes==
Bequesh appeared in ''[[Shintel Downtime]]'', the fourth [[Roleplaying game|RPG]] adventure in ''[[The DarkStryder Campaign]]'' written by [[Paul Sudlow]] and published in [[1995]].
